title: Phantasium
description: optimizes client-performance specifically for servers running ModelEngine, ItemsAdder, Nexo, and Oraxen
body:
**Phantasium** is a client-side optimization mod for Minecraft designed specifically for servers running **ModelEngine**, **Nexo**, **ItemsAdder**, and **Oraxen**. four popular plugins that spawn large numbers of display entities, armor stands, and custom packets that general-purpose optimization mods have no awareness of.

The mod works entirely **client-side** and requires no **server-side** installation. It automatically detects which plugins are active on the server you join and applies the relevant optimizations without any manual setup.

For players on custom RPG or survival servers, **Phantasium** can provide significant FPS improvements in areas with heavy plugin activity, particularly in towns, hubs, and combat zones where ModelEngine mobs and Oraxen/ItemsAdder furniture are densely placed. Expect the most noticeable gains in areas where many custom mobs are on screen simultaneously.

**Phantasium** is designed to run alongside general optimization mods like Sodium, EntityCulling, and ImmediatelyFast, covering the plugin-specific layer those mods cannot optimize.

# Installation
Make sure you have the latest version of Fabric Loader and drop the mod into your mods folder. Fabric API is required. No additional setup or server-side installation is needed. Phantasium activates automatically when it detects a compatible plugin on the server you join.


# Reporting Issues
Please use the issue tracker linked at the top of the page to report bugs, crashes, and other issues. When reporting, include which plugins the server is running and your full mod list.


## NOTE
this mod is still in its alpha stages so expect a ton of bugs like texture packs most likely breaking.
